prompt: Create a hyper-realistic full-body fashion portrait of a stylish young man walking confidently along the peaceful shoreline of a calm lake during bright daytime. Warm natural daylight creates soft shadows and enhances the tranquil atmosphere. Capture realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, cinematic composition, ultra-sharp focus, vibrant natural colors, high dynamic range, professional fashion photography, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine style, 85mm lens, f/2.8, 8K ultra-HD quality, photorealistic, highly detailed.
